positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. The main subject is a grouping of glowing, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms, interconnected with delicate roots and glowing vines, set against a deep twilight background. Incorporate abstract constellations and subtle lunar motifs integrated into the surrounding foliage. The style should be highly graphic, resembling a combination of Art Nouveau line work and modern vector design. Focus on strong black silhouette elements juxtaposed with vivid, contrasting neon colors—deep sapphire blues, electric lavender, and lime green bioluminescence. The composition must be centralized, suitable for repeating or single-panel apparel printing, ensuring clean lines and strong separation of foreground and background. Use flat, solid color areas and excellent visual contrast for maximum print impact. Perfect symmetry is preferred.
